<ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhě</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：<ruby>虚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>空<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>虚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>空<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>虚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>空<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>虚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>空<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>虚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>空<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kōnɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Rén</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>劳<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">láo</rt></ruby><ruby>碌<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>劳<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">láo</rt></ruby><ruby>碌<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>益<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chù</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ne</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yí</rt></ruby><ruby>代<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>代<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">què</rt></ruby><ruby>永<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>长<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>存<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cún</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Rì</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tou</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tou</rt></ruby><ruby>落<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luò</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby>，<ruby>急<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>风<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Fēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>往<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>南<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nán</rt></ruby><ruby>刮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>北<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">běi</rt></ruby><ruby>转<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuǎn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>旋<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xuán</rt></ruby><ruby>转<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuǎn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>且<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiě</rt></ruby><ruby>返<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>转<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>原<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>江<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>河<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>往<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>海<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>流<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>海<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">què</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>满<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǎn</rt></ruby>；<ruby>江<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>河<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>何<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chù</rt></ruby><ruby>流<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>仍<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>还<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huán</rt></ruby><ruby>何<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>万<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wàn</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>令<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>厌<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yàn</rt></ruby><ruby>烦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby>（<ruby>或<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby>“<ruby>万<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wàn</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>满<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>困<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kùn</rt></ruby><ruby>乏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fá</rt></ruby>”），<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>尽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìn</rt></ruby>。<ruby>眼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kàn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>饱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎo</rt></ruby>；<ruby>耳<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ěr</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>足<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zú</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>再<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby>；<ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>再<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Rì</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wú</rt></ruby><ruby>新<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>岂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>件<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>指<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>新<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>？<ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>代<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>早<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>代<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wú</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>记<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>念<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niɑn</rt></ruby>；<ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>代<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>记<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>念<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niɑn</rt></ruby>。<ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>识<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>虚<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>空<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">kōnɡ</rt></ruby>

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhě</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>冷<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wánɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>专<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhuān</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>智<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>慧<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>寻<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xún</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>查<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chá</rt></ruby><ruby>究<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiū</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>经<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>练<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">liàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>极<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>重<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>劳<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">láo</rt></ruby><ruby>苦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kǔ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>虚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xū</rt></ruby><ruby>空<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>捕<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>风<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēnɡ</rt></ruby>。
